case_title: MAHNAZ SADEGHI HARDANGI ET AL VS. ANDREW ZANGRILLI

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZANGRILLI, ANDREW

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARDANGI, MAHNAZ SADEGHI REZVANI, PARSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZANGRILLI, ANDREW $6,026.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,101.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HARDANGI, MAHNAZ SADEGHI REZVANI, PARSA AS TO DEFENDANT ZANGRILLI, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS MAHNAZ SADEGHI HARDING AND PARSA REZVANI ARE PRESENT. POUYA REZVANI, PLAINTIFF'S SON INTERPERTS FOR PLAINTIFF MAHNAZ SADEGHI HARDING(FARSI) INTERPERTER'S OATH IS GIVEN PRIOR TO THE START OF TODAY'S TRIAL. DEFENDANT ANDREW ZANGRILLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. ISAAC ZANGRILLI, SON OF DEFENDANT TESTIFIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBIT REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
